title: valerianella radiata var. patellaria
intro: Valerianella radiata var. patellaria, also known as variegated corn spurrey or variegated valerianella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Valerianella radiata var. patellaria can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
